When I level up, Rally.
Start adventures with +1 Revive Last Breath: If it's the first time I've been slain this game, revive me with 1 Health.
You earn 50% additional gold during adventures.
When I level up, create a copy of my champion spell in hand. It costs 0 this round.
Plunder: I cost 2 less.
Round Start: Refill your spell mana.
Round Start: Draw 1 and give it Fleeting.
All of your spells and skills deal 1 extra damage.
When I survive damage, grant me +2|+2.
Round Start: Create a Fleeting copy of me in hand.
When I'm summoned, create 2 Warning Shots in hand.
Allies have Challenger.
Allies have Overwhelm.
+0|+3 and Sharpsight.
I have +1|+1 for every 200 gold you have.
+1|+1 and when I kill an enemy, you earn 50 gold. (Max 2 kills per encounter)
When I level up, Stun all enemies.
Your Nexus has Tough.
Plunder: Play a Cannon Barrage a number of times equal to my cost.
+1|+1 and when you win an encounter without taking any Nexus damage, earn 1 Reroll.
When I'm summoned, discard your hand then create that many Pow-Pows in hand.
When I'm summoned, create a Redoubled Valor in hand. It costs 3.
When I'm summoned, I strike the enemy Nexus.
When I'm summoned, I strike the weakest enemy.
Support: Grant my supported ally Elusive.
Allied champions have +1|+1 and cost 2 less.
Adventure Start: Add 2 copied of a random Champion to your deck. Attach a random Epic item to it.
When you play a spell, if you have 6+ mana gems, copy it with the same targets.
Support: Create a 1 cost 1|1 copy of my supported ally in hand.
Support: Kill my supported ally and grant me its keywords and stats.
Scout Round End: Shuffle me into your deck.
When i'm summoned, grant me +1|+1 and a random keyword for every 30 cards that started in your deck.
When i'm summoned, grant Epic items to 3 randoù cards in your deck.
+1|+1 and when i kill a unit, summon a random husk.
Support: Transform my supported ally into a random follower that costs 3 more.
Play: Grant enemies Gloom.
Evolve When ANY unit dies, grant me its keywords.
Play: Deal 3 to all other units.
Round end: Grant me Impact twice if I'm in hand (max Impact 10).
Round Start: Create a Fleeting Falling Comet in hand..
Quest: Win a 3+ Stard Adventure. Reward: Upgrade a Rare Reli Slot on this champion to Epic.
Fated, AugmentEmpowered 10: Overwhelm, Regeneration, and Challenger.
+1|+0While I'm attacking, I can't take damage or die.
I cost 1 less for each ally in play.Play: Deal 3 to all other allies.
Game Start: Create 7 copies of me in deck. Champion Spells cost 1 less.
Play: Draw the highest cost card that costs less than my base cost, grant it an Epic item, and reduce its cost to 0.
Play: Shuffle 5 level 2 champions into your deck and double their stats, then draw one of them.
Plunder: I cost 2 less.I have +1|+1 for each different round you've damaged the enemy Nexus.
When I'm summoned, create 2 random 7+ cost units from your regions and reduce their cost by my base cost.
Power: Allies that cost 1 or less have Overwhelm, Quick Attack, and Fury.
Power: Allies have Overwhelm, and if they have a subtype, +1|+1.
Power: Game Start: If I'm in deck or hand and Titanic, +1 Starting Mana. You can find Level 2 Champions when you Invoke or Manifest.
Power: When an ally gains stats from a spell, it gains twice that many instead.
Power: When you gain the attack token, create a random spell that costs 2 from your regions in hand. It costs 0 and is Fleeting.
Challenger, Tough, and Overwhelm
+0|+2Power: When you summon an ally, grant it +0|+1 and Formidable
+2|+0Support: If my supported ally is a follower, grant it Ephemeral and summon an exact copy of it attacking.
Power: Game Start: If I'm Norra, +1 starting mana.When you summon a created ally, grant it Impact.
Spirit Attack: Boost all units.
Power: If I'm Lux, +1 starting mana.Game Start: Draw a follower that costs 2 or less and grant it Targon's Brace.
Power: Your elemental spells and Skills deal 2 extra damage.
Power: When an ally that costs 1 or less attacks,  deal 1 to the enemy Nexus.
Power: If I'm Yasuo, +1 starting mana. When you Recall an enemy, increase its cost by 2.
Power: Game Start: Drain 5 from the enemy Nexus.Play: If I'm Swain, refill your spell mana.
+1|+2.When I level up, refill 3 mana. If I'm Jayce, refill 6 mana instead.
+2|+0 and Challenger.Power: Game Start: Shuffle two Deaths From Below into your deck and grant Deaths From Below a random epic item.
Power: Game Start: Plant 6 Flashbomb Traps in the top 8 cards of the enemy deck. When a trap misses, replant it in the top 8 cards of the enemy deck.
3 ImpactPlay: If I have 10+ Power, give me Barrier and start a free attack Challenging the strongest enemy.
Game Start: If I'm in deck or hand, summon a Stormcarved Spire with Countdown 4: Summon me.
Power: Your spells and skills deal 1 extra damage.
Play, Attack, and Round Start: Forge me.
Power: When you play or level up a champion, refill your spell mana.
Power: When you summon an ally, grant it SpellShield.
+3 Rerolls+10% to find Epic powers and items.
+200 Starting Gold.Power: Allies have +1|+1 for every 12 cards in your deck past 18 at game start.
Power: Game Start: Create an Evelynn in hand. When you summon a Husk, it loses Immobile.
Power: Your Nexus has Tough. I am Tech.
When you Recall another unit, grant me +1|+0.Power: Game Start: Create a Homecoming in hand and grant it Double Time Watch.
OverwhelmAttack: Deal 2 to the enemy Nexus. If I've already attacked this round, deal 2 to all enemies as well.
Power: When you play a card that costs 3+ mana, Terrify 1. While the enemy deck has 15 or fewer cards, allies have +2|+2 and Overwhelm.
Power: When you play an ally with 2+ Health, deal 1 to it and grant it Overwhelm and Impact.
Power: Game Start: Grant a random spell from your deck an item with "-1 cost and draw 1". Create 4 copies of it in your deck.
Power: If I'm Kayle, +1 Starting Mana.I have +1|+0 for each encounter you've won this adventure.
Power: Round Start: Create a Hex Core Upgrade in hand. Your Hex Core Upgrades have Stopwatch and can upgrade any ally.
Power: When you play a 6+ base cost unit, deal 2 to all enemies and the enemy Nexus.
Power: When you play a champion, it strikes the weakest enemy. If it's Nasus, it also strikes the strongest enemy.
Deep and I am a Sea Monster.When I'm summoned, if you aren't Deep, Toss equal to my cost.
Power: When you level up an allied champion, summon Lux. If you already have Lux, summon Garen instead. If you have both and not Galio, summon Galio.
+10 Nexus Health.Power: If I'm Tryndamere, when you grant stats to a unit in your deck, grant twice as much.
ChallengerPower: When you play a champion, summon a Warlord's Palace or advance it 2 rounds.
Power: Allies with Daybreak have Tough. When an ally activates Daybreak, grant allies +0|+1.
+1|+1Power: Game Start: Create a 1 cost Wild Card in your deck for every 7 cards in your deck.
+2|+0 and Overwhelm.When I kill an enemy in combat, create 2 Coins in hand.
SpellshieldWhen I deal damage, plant that many Poison Puffcaps in the enemy deck.
Power: Your Skills deal 1 extra damage per Stunned enemy.
When I'm summoned or Round Start: I steal up to 3 Health from a random enemy unit. It can't drop below 1 health.
Tough SpellShield Attack: If I'm Thresh, summon an attacking Ephemeral copy of a champion in your deck with less Power.
Power: Ephemeral allies have Overwhelm.Play: If I'm a Spirit Blossom unit, Summon 2 Fox-Fires.
Power: Attacking Ephemeral allies can't take damage or die.
OverwhelmGame Start: If I'm a Spirit Blossom unit, set my cost to 10.
ToughPlay: Frostbite the strongest enemy. If I'm Anivia, Frostbite ALL enemies instead.
Power: Game Start: Shuffle 3 Tibbers into your deck.Your Tibbers cost 2 less and have +5|+5.
If I'm a Spirit Blossom unit, I cost 1 less for each different round you targeted an ally.
+2|+0 and Challenger,Play: Play Apprehend on the strongest enemy.
+0|+3 Power: When you play or transform a Darkin, it strikes the weakest enemy.
+1|+1If I'm an Ascended, I cost 1 less.Play: Advance your Buried Sun Disc 3 rounds.
If I'm a Dragon, I have +4|+0 and Overwhelm. Otherwise, I have +2|+0 and Fury.
Spirit, Impact, Evolve.Power: Fearsome allies can only be blocked by units with 5+ Power.
